title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Fiscal Responsibility and Budget Management Act, 2003. (2) It extends to the whole of India. (3) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint in this behalf.
footnote: 1. 5th July, 2004, vide notification No. G.S.R. 395(E), dated 2nd July, 2004, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i)
